revision.description: Removed py-10 sm:py-16 padding from CardsGrid section element to match DynamicContentCarousel pattern
changes: Section now has only base class and dark mode toggle, matching DynamicContentCarousel
revision.reason: Align section structure with DynamicContentCarousel. All padding now comes from container div only (py-18 md:py-23 in dark mode).

tsxPhpSync.details: Both CardsGrid.tsx (line 106) and CardsGrid.php (line 28) now use identical section classes: only 'cards-grid' base class and conditional 'dark bg-transparent!' for dark mode. No py-10 sm:py-16 padding on section element. TSX and PHP are perfectly in sync.

consistencyWithDynamicContentCarousel.details: CardsGrid section structure now matches DynamicContentCarousel exactly. DynamicContentCarousel also has no padding on the section element - only base class 'dynamic-content-carousel' and 'dark bg-transparent!' toggle. All padding comes from the container div inside. Pattern consistency achieved.
consistencyWithDynamicContentCarousel.note: Both blocks now follow the same pattern: section has only block name and dark mode toggle, container div has all padding and pseudo-element styling

build.details: Build completes successfully with no TypeScript errors. Asset size warnings are pre-existing and unrelated to the section padding removal.

rendering.details: All 13 block instances on test page render correctly without section padding. Block count verified: 13 takt/cards-grid blocks, all properly nested in DemoContainer wrappers. Screenshots captured at 375px and 1440px showing proper rendering with padding now coming only from container div.
rendering.layoutImpact: Section no longer has py-10 sm:py-16. All vertical spacing now comes from container div (py-18 md:py-23 in dark mode only). Light mode blocks rely on DemoContainer or parent element spacing.

cardsGrid.container: py-18 md:py-23 in dark mode, no padding in light mode

dynamicContentCarousel.container: py-18 md:py-23 in dark mode, no padding in light mode

patternComparison.match: complete - both blocks follow identical dark mode pattern

screenshots.purpose: Verify blocks render correctly without section padding. Padding now comes only from container div in dark mode.
